target_phenotype: Morphological cell phenotype — cell and nuclear shape, texture, and intensity features across 4 imaging channels (DNA, mitochondria, actin/Golgi/plasma membrane, ER)

perturbation.library_or_reagent: Genome-wide sgRNA library, filtered to genes with relevant phenotypes (~3,715 genes retained)

readout.measurement: High-content fluorescence imaging of fixed cells
readout.instrument_or_platform: Optical pooled screening (in situ sequencing + imaging)
readout.primary_metric: Morphological feature vectors — genes are clustered by similarity of phenotypic profiles across imaging channels

clustering.method: Leiden clustering on PHATE-embedded phenotypic profiles

notes: Cell Painting-style 4-channel screen covering DNA, mitochondria, actin/Golgi/plasma membrane, and ER. Filtered gene set (3,715 genes). All cell cycle phases included. Clusters represent sets of genes whose knockout produces similar morphological phenotypes.
